extortion.description: [AI generated] "Gilariver.org" is the official website for the Gila River Indian Community, a sovereign tribe located in Arizona. The community consists of members from the Akimel O'odham (Pima) and Pee-Posh (Maricopa) tribes. The site provides information about their government, services, cultural heritage, economic enterprises, and community events, highlighting their commitment to preserving their traditions and promoting development.
